sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60781" key="kuminodo/kon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠμῑνο-δόκον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n60781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">box for cummin, spice-box</tr_>, placed on the table <abbr TEIform="abbr">like</abbr> a salt-cellar, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0480.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicoch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠμῑνο-δόκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0413.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.Gel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠμῑνο-δόχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.93</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠμῑνο-θήκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Demioprat.ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
